Signature wheels: Fragrant Morphogenesis (SSR) + Muddied Fairy Tale (SR). Aliemus-battery / corrosion CARO chorus.

Signature WoD is unmatched (E0+ per Lyra: five stars, everything he wants). Functional alternates: Power of the Pious and Aberrant Devour (aliemus regen + crit DMG). Lyra rates Treasured Rarity's kill-stacking as impractical for him despite the crit DMG mainstat. Uvhash's and Lotan's work only as +12 stat additions, never the functional slot. Covenants: Dream of Medicine (his cards matter) first; aliemus recharge or a crit set (April Tribute / Crimson Pulse / Cocoon of the Maiden) if the bottle went elsewhere; a Twisted Twin at E3 since Strike/Defense pull Gaunts.
